goal: Send the final SMTP batch to push provider_accepted from 96 to 100, then produce the terminal close-out brief — the last send mission before the reply window.
success_criteria: provider_accepted reaches 100 or maximum feasible given current unsent inventory
Terminal operator brief written with final pipeline state and 'await replies' directive

slices.task: Step 1: Find remaining unsent leads — sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite "SELECT l.id,l.name,l.contact_info,l.score FROM leads l WHERE l.contact_info LIKE '%@%' AND l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lead_id FROM email_attempts WHERE status='provider_accepted') AND l.stage NOT IN ('archived','lost') ORDER BY l.score DESC LIMIT 4". Step 2: Send each via SMTP — GMAIL_ADDRESS='owner@outboundautonomy.com' python3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/scripts/gmail-smtp-send.py --to <email> --subject 'Free website audit for <name>' --body 'Hi, I run Outbound Autonomy. We scan business websites and show exactly what is costing you leads — free audit with specific fixes at outboundautonomy.com/try.' Step 3: Log each: sqlite3 ... "INSERT INTO email_attempts (lead_id,recipient,provider,sender,status,provider_message_id) VALUES ('<id>','<email>','gmail_smtp','owner@outboundautonomy.com','provider_accepted','<msg_id>')". Step 4: After sends, produce the terminal snapshot: sqlite3 ... 'SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM email_attempts GROUP BY status', sqlite3 ... 'SELECT stage, COUNT(*) FROM leads GROUP BY stage', curl outboundautonomy.com/ /try /sample-report /pricing. Write everything — send results + terminal pipeline snapshot + 'OPERATOR: Await replies to ~100 sends. Reply window 24-72h. Any reply = RED (operator must respond personally).' — to artifacts/missions/final-sweep-20260429-0833/bridge-terminal.md. This is the LAST send mission. End the file with 'CYCLE COMPLETE.'

reasoning: 96 provider_accepted. 4 more reaches 100 — a clean milestone. This mission does the final sends AND writes the terminal brief in one slice so it actually executes. After this, the pipeline is flushed, the reply window opens, and the cycle is complete. Single slice = single artifact = higher probability of execution.
